warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 toe walks
10 heel walks
Wrist Mobilisation
30 Sec KB Ankle rocks

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 10
Odd - 2-4 Bar Muscle Ups
Even - 8-10 Alternating Pistols or alternative scaled version.

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
30 sec Hollow Hold
Pull Up Progression
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Lean Back to begin Pull
Big Hip Pop
Singles - Focus on Pulling into the bar and pushing away
EMOM x 5
Jumping C2B - Pause at the bar and slow lower
- Maintain Hollow - Pull Ribs into hips
Pistols
EMOM x 10 mins
Odd Minutes
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
Even MInutes
20 Second Pistol Holds (each leg)
OR Gymnastics squat hold
EMOM x 5
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes pulling strength and leg stability; chest/hamstrings/triceps work antagonistically without CNS fatigue.
